cel.position: foreground-left, close to camera and largest in frame, body angled in toward Hae-won on a diagonal
cel.pose: balancing a drink tray on her left hand at shoulder height; right hand shooting out to catch the falling bottle — exactly two hands, both her own

hae-won.position: mid-ground-right, set back and smaller than Cel, turned three-quarter toward her
hae-won.pose: right hand also darting up to catch the same bottle, left hand clutching her sun hat brim — exactly two hands, both her own

spatial_rules: Cel foreground-large, Hae-won mid-ground-smaller — staggered depth, not a flat eye-line
diagonal axis between them, apparent size difference from camera depth not from height change
both at tier 1, same real height
4 hands total, all accounted: Cel's tray hand + catching hand, Hae-won's catching hand + hat hand
lighting: warm golden-hour key from the low sun, long shadows on the baywalk
